items.body_excerpt:
LeBron ➡️ Indiana? 🤔 

While we know there’s less than a 1% chance of LeBron coming to the Pacers, there’s still a glimmer of hope until he makes his decision🤞💭 

I dove into how Indy could acquire both LeBron & Bronny James 👀
